sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Gap Inc. Names Paramount Exec Pamela Kaufman EVP, Chief Entertainment Officer
feed.summary: Gap Inc. has appointed Pamela Kaufman, a former Paramount executive, as its Executive Vice President and Chief Entertainment Officer, a new role designed to integrate the retailer more deeply into entertainment. She will report to CEO Richard Dickson, leading the company's "Fashiontainment" platform to scale content and licensing across various entertainment sectors and cultural collaborations. This move aims to leverage entertainment to create brand fandoms and drive growth for Gap Inc.'s portfolio.

feed.title: Why Alto Ingredients Remains Unprofitable Despite Market Leadership
feed.summary: Alto Ingredients (ALTO), a market leader in specialty alcohols and renewable fuels, continues to face profitability challenges due to commodity price sensitivity, high debt, and asset impairment charges. Despite ongoing losses since 2022, the company is implementing a turnaround strategy focused on cost streamlining, exiting unprofitable activities, and leveraging the Section 45Z clean fuel tax credit. Alto Ingredients is also expanding carbon dioxide capture to create new revenue streams and improve sustainability.

feed.title: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG
feed.summary: This article provides a release from QIAGEN N.V. regarding a voting rights announcement made by the AFM. The notification details transactions and holdings involving Goldman Sachs Group Inc., The, and other related entities, outlining their direct and indirect capital interests and voting rights in QIAGEN N.V. The reported transaction date is January 12, 2026.

feed.title: SLM CORPORATION (NASDAQ: SLM) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Reminds SLM Corporation Investors of Upcoming Deadline
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for SLM Corporation (NASDAQ: SLM) investors, reminding them of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that SLM Corporation, also known as Sallie Mae, made misrepresentations regarding its loss mitigation and loan modification programs, as well as the stability of its private education loan delinquency rates between July 25, 2025, and August 14, 2025. Investors who purchased shares during this period and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the law firm to discuss their legal options and the process of becoming a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Why Paccar (PCAR) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
feed.summary: Paccar (PCAR) outperformed the general market today, with its stock price increasing by 2.45% compared to the S&P 500's 0.26% gain. Over the past month, PCAR has seen a 6.6% increase, significantly outpacing its sector and the broader market. Investors are now looking forward to the company's upcoming earnings report on January 27, 2026, which is projected to show a decrease in EPS and revenue year-over-year.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $60,000 of LAM RESEARCH CORPORATION lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: LAM RESEARCH CORPORATION disclosed $60,000 in lobbying expenses for Q4 2025, focusing on semiconductor industry advocacy. The article also details recent congressional stock trading activities for LRCX, with more sales than purchases, and insider trading where top executives predominantly sold shares. Additionally, it highlights hedge fund activity, analyst ratings, and price targets for LRCX, indicating significant institutional investment shifts and mostly positive analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Unlock New Cruise Rewards with Royal Caribbean Group Points Choice Loyalty Program
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has introduced a new "Points Choice" loyalty program, allowing travelers to earn points across its brands (Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, Silversea) and apply them to their preferred loyalty program. This program, available for sailings from January 30, 2026, enhances flexibility and maximizes the value of loyalty points, building on the success of their "Status Match" program. It empowers guests to customize their cruise experience and gain more control over their rewards.

feed.title: Kroger Health Reaches New Milestone in Prescription Drug Safety Program
feed.summary: Kroger Health announced a new milestone in its Prescription Drug Safety program, having reached over 250,000 students. The program, developed in partnership with Everfi, aims to educate high school students on the safe use, storage, and disposal of prescription medications. This initiative reflects Kroger Health's commitment to building healthier communities by empowering young people with knowledge to prevent drug misuse.

feed.title: Kroger Teams With Uber as Food Prices Pressure Consumers
feed.summary: Kroger has partnered with Uber, Uber Eats, and Postmates to offer same-day delivery from nearly 2,700 Kroger-owned stores across the country. This expansion of Kroger's digital footprint comes as consumers face pressure from rising food prices, with inflation impacting essential spending and influencing shopping habits. The collaboration aims to provide greater convenience and flexibility for customers seeking groceries and last-minute items.

feed.title: Intuit Announces Annual Stockholder Meeting
feed.summary: Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU) announced it will hold its annual stockholder meeting virtually on Thursday, January 22, at 8:00 AM Pacific time. CEO Sasan Goodarzi will review fiscal year 2025 results and discuss the company's growth strategy. The meeting will be webcast live on Intuit's investor relations website, with a replay available afterwards.

feed.title: Globe Life Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. will release its Fourth Quarter 2025 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. The announcement will be followed by a live conference call on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 11:00 am Eastern. Further financial information and replay options will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Hines files to split 63.8-acre Centene campus property in North Natomas into three lots
feed.summary: Hines, the developer of the Centene campus in North Natomas, has applied to divide the 63.8-acre property into three separate lots. This move suggests Hines may be exploring future development options for the site. The article highlights this as a significant commercial real estate development in Sacramento.

feed.title: (WPM) Technical Data (WPM:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides technical data for Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. (WPM:CA) as of January 15, 2026, including AI-generated trading signals and ratings. It suggests long-term buying opportunities and lists numerous recent articles related to WPM:CA's trading and investment analysis.

feed.title: Hormel taps Domenic Borrelli as executive vice president of Retail
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has appointed Domenic Borrelli as executive vice president of Retail, effective February 23. Borrelli, who has over 25 years of experience from companies like Danone, Kraft, and Maple Leaf, will oversee Hormel's Retail business unit, which includes its most recognized consumer brands. John Ghingo, president of Hormel Foods, highlighted Borrelli's proven track record in driving consumer-driven growth and his strategic leadership skills as key assets for advancing the company's retail agenda.

feed.title: Wearable Devices schedules special shareholder meeting for February 19
feed.summary: Wearable Devices Ltd. (NASDAQ:WLDS) has announced a Special General Meeting of Shareholders to be held on February 19, 2026. Only shareholders of record by January 22, 2026, will be eligible to vote. The company, based in Israel, disclosed these details in an SEC filing, though the specific agenda was not provided in the announcement.

feed.title: Is It Worth Investing in Devon Energy (DVN) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
feed.summary: This article examines the investment potential of Devon Energy (DVN) by comparing Wall Street's bullish recommendations with its intrinsic value. While Devon Energy has a strong average brokerage recommendation of 1.50, the article cautions against relying solely on these ratings due to potential biases. Instead, it suggests using the Zacks Rank, which points to a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell) for DVN, as a more reliable indicator for investment decisions.

feed.title: Is Teladoc’s Data‑Driven 24/7 Care Upgrade Quietly Reframing Its Integrated Care Story (TDOC)?
feed.summary: Teladoc Health recently enhanced its 24/7 Care virtual urgent care service, expanding treatable conditions and integrating specialist consults using data for preventive care and real-time prescription checks. This upgrade aligns with Teladoc's strategy to evolve its broad virtual care footprint into a more efficient, integrated platform. While it showcases deeper data integration, the immediate impact on revenue growth tension and profitability pressures remains to be seen.

feed.title: Walmart International CEO Kath McLay to leave the retailer
feed.summary: Kath McLay, CEO of Walmart International, is departing the company after a decade of service. McLay will remain in her role until January 31 and work through the first quarter to ensure a smooth transition. She was previously CEO of Sam's Club, where she achieved 12 consecutive quarters of double-digit sales growth, and was considered a potential successor for the Walmart U.S. CEO position.

feed.title: Unlocking the Potential of Synchrony Financial: A Deep Dive Into SYF Stock
feed.summary: This article from Motley Fool delves into Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF), offering insights from expert analysts on market trends and potential investment opportunities. While Synchrony Financial is discussed, it's important to note that the Motley Fool Stock Advisor team did not include it in their top 10 stock picks. The article encourages readers to explore Stock Advisor for their latest recommendations, which have historically shown significant returns.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies stock: Quiet consolidation or the start of a bigger upside move?
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies stock is currently experiencing a quiet consolidation phase, reflected in a modest pullback from recent highs, but analysts and underlying business momentum suggest a potential for future upside. Despite macro headwinds faced last year, the company delivered a positive double-digit return to investors, demonstrating resilience through product diversification. Wall Street maintains a cautiously optimistic outlook, with many firms issuing "Buy" ratings and price targets suggesting a mid-teens to twenty-plus percent upside, driven by strong demand in areas like AI, advanced computing, and aerospace and defense.

feed.title: Assessing Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Valuation After The CES 2026 Launch Of Libre Assist AI Tool
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is drawing attention after launching Libre Assist, an AI-driven tool for diabetes patients, at CES 2026. Despite a recent share price decline over 90 days, the company has seen positive longer-term returns and is currently deemed 14.7% undervalued by one narrative, while a DCF model suggests overvaluation. Investors are encouraged to consider various valuation perspectives, earnings forecasts, and potential risks like diagnostic pricing pressure.

feed.title: PTA-PVR: QIAGEN N.V.: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG
feed.summary: This article announces that QIAGEN N.V. was informed by the AFM (the Netherlands Authority For the Financial Markets) about a notification concerning voting rights. The notification, released on January 15, 2026, details Goldman Sachs Group Inc.'s holdings in QIAGEN N.V., including various types of shares, call options, swaps, convertible bonds, and warrants. The distribution shows Goldman Sachs's total capital interest and voting rights at 3.60%, primarily held indirectly.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Alibaba (BABA) After Its 111% One Year Share Price Surge
feed.summary: Alibaba Group Holding's stock has surged by 111% over the last year, prompting a reassessment of its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 39.2% undervalued, while its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio implies it may be trading below its fundamental-implied level. The article also presents "Narratives" for Alibaba, outlining both bull and bear cases with different assumptions that lead to varying fair value estimates.

feed.title: Smith+Nephew will pay up to $450M for Integrity Orthopaedics
feed.summary: Smith+Nephew announced its agreement to acquire Integrity Orthopaedics for up to $450 million. The deal includes an upfront payment of $225 million and up to $225 million in performance-based payments over five years, expected to close by the end of the month. This acquisition expands Smith+Nephew's shoulder repair portfolio with Integrity Orthopaedics' Tendon Seam rotator cuff repair system, aligning with the company's "RISE 2026" strategy for financial and operational advancement.

feed.title: Three changes hitting Texas Roadhouse in 2026
feed.summary: Texas Roadhouse is implementing three main changes in 2026: significant expansion with approximately 35 new locations, continued tech updates including digital kitchen screens and online waitlists, and redesigns of existing restaurants. Despite gradual price increases due to inflation and rising costs, the restaurant chain continues to see strong sales and customer loyalty, maintaining its top spot as America's favorite casual dining chain.

feed.title: Western Digital stock jumps after Barclays, Wells lift targets as AI storage trade heats up
feed.summary: Western Digital shares saw a significant jump after Barclays and Wells Fargo raised their price targets, citing AI-driven data demand as a key growth factor for storage and semiconductor companies. Retail investors are increasingly keen on memory and storage stocks due to anticipated tight supply and firm pricing from AI buildouts. While some analysts remain cautious, investors are keenly awaiting Western Digital's late-January earnings for further validation of the AI storage trade.

feed.title: D James Bidzos Sells 2,000 Shares of VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN) Stock
feed.summary: D. James Bidzos, CEO of VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN), sold 2,000 shares of the company's stock on January 14, 2026, for a total of $496,560, reducing his position by 0.48%. This sale is part of a recurring pattern of insider selling by Bidzos since October, including several 5,000-share transactions. VeriSign shares are trading around $249, and the company has a "Hold" consensus analyst rating with an average price target of $282.

feed.title: D James Bidzos Sells 5,000 Shares of VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN) Stock
feed.summary: D. James Bidzos, CEO of VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN), sold 5,000 shares of the company's stock on January 13th for $1.241 million, reducing his ownership by 1.19%. This sale is part of a series of insider transactions where Bidzos has sold approximately 37,000 shares since October 22nd, totaling about $9.15 million. VeriSign's stock is currently trading near $249, has a market cap of $23.1 billion, and carries a consensus Hold rating from analysts with an average target price of $282.00.

feed.title: News Corp Continues US$2 Billion Buyback Focused on Nasdaq-Listed Shares
feed.summary: News Corp is proceeding with its US$2 billion share buyback program, specifically targeting its Nasdaq-listed Class A and B common stock. The repurchases will occur in U.S. markets, excluding ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests, with the goal of affecting the capital structure primarily for U.S. shareholders. An analyst rating on News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh (AU:NWS) stock is currently a Hold with a A$47.00 price target.

feed.title: Altria Group, Inc. (MO): A Deep Value Consumer Staples Cash Machine
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. (MO) is highlighted as a deep value opportunity among consumer staples, exhibiting strong cash generation and a modest discount to its intrinsic value. Despite secular declines in tobacco consumption, Altria maintains high margins and consistent free cash flow, largely returned to shareholders through dividends, making it attractive for income and value-focused investors. The article details Altria's business model, financial metrics, and addresses why it remains undervalued despite known industry risks.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Anousheh Ansari Sells 1,000 Shares of Jabil Inc (JBL)
feed.summary: Anousheh Ansari, a Director at Jabil Inc, sold 1,000 shares of the company on January 15, 2026, reducing her holdings to 33,900 shares. Jabil Inc's stock is currently trading at $246 per share, with a price-earnings ratio of 39.37, which is higher than the industry median and its historical median. The GF Value indicates that Jabil Inc is significantly overvalued, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.65.

feed.title: RBC Capital Maintains IDEX Corp(IEX.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $211
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Deane Dray has reiterated a Buy rating on IDEX Corp (IEX.US) and increased the target price from $195 to $211. According to TipRanks data, Dray has a 62.2% success rate and an average return of 13.4% over the past year. This report highlights the analyst's continued confidence in IDEX Corp's stock performance.

feed.title: The Home Depot, Inc. (HD): Our Calculation of Intrinsic Value
feed.summary: This article presents a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis for The Home Depot, Inc. (HD), calculating its intrinsic value to be approximately $146 per share. This figure stands in contrast to its current market price of around $375, indicating a negative margin of safety of 61%. While acknowledging Home Depot's strong competitive advantages and cash generation, the analysis suggests its current valuation implies expectations for future growth and returns that exceed conservative estimates.

feed.title: Halliburton (HAL) Plans to Rebuild Venezuela's Oil Infrastructure Within Months
feed.summary: Halliburton CEO Jeff Miller expressed the company's readiness to rebuild Venezuela's oil and gas infrastructure within months, highlighting its flexible business model and extensive Venezuelan workforce. Despite concerns about market competition and the lack of U.S. financial guarantees, Halliburton believes its existing resources position it well for potential contracts. Analyst opinions on Halliburton's stock performance are mixed, with some raising price targets due to perceived opportunities in Venezuela, while others downgrade citing an unjustified market "euphoria" amidst declining oil prices.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) Given New $68.00 Price Target at BMO Capital Markets
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets has increased its price target for Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) to $68.00, up from $55.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of approximately 13.48% from the stock's current price. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $0.50 EPS on $6.97 billion in revenue, and the overall analyst consensus remains a "Buy" with an average price target of $54.30.

feed.title: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) Insider Sells $537,600.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Chevron insider Alana Knowles sold 3,200 shares of CVX stock for $537,600, reducing her stake by over 72%. Despite this insider sale, the company maintains a 4.1% dividend yield, and is expected to receive an expanded Venezuela license, which could boost production and cash flow. Analyst consensus for Chevron is currently "Hold" with an average price target of $168.14.

feed.title: Kansas City mulls options to try to prevent major changes to Midtown Costco
feed.summary: Kansas City leaders are concerned about potential significant changes at the Midtown Costco location on Linwood Boulevard. There are worries the store might convert to a business center, which would eliminate popular services and products like the food court, pharmacy, and rotisserie chickens, shifting focus towards restaurants and businesses. Mayor Quinton Lucas and Council Member Melissa Patterson Hazley have introduced a resolution to work with Costco to maintain the store's current style and services amidst plans for a new Costco in Lee's Summit.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $640,000 of ALBEMARLE CORPORATION lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation (ALB) disclosed $640,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, focusing on legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act and critical mineral supply. This report also details recent insider trading activity, with two sales totaling $29,080, and significant hedge fund movements in ALB stock. Analysts have largely issued "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings, with a median price target of $136.0.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) EVP Sells 5,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) EVP Paul Joseph sold 5,000 shares of the company's stock for over $450,000, reducing his stake by 22.21%. This transaction occurred on January 15th, with shares trading around $90.17. Despite the insider selling, Akamai recently beat EPS estimates and provided strong FY2025 guidance, yet analysts generally rate the stock as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $95.28.

feed.title: Stata Ray sells Analog Devices (ADI) shares worth $1.85 million
feed.summary: Director Stata Ray sold 6,021 shares of Analog Devices (ADI) on January 13 and 14, 2026, for a total of $1.85 million. These transactions were executed under a pre-arranged trading plan and occurred while ADI's stock was trading near its 52-week high. The article also mentions positive analyst ratings and recent strong quarterly results for Analog Devices.

feed.title: Jiuzi Holdings regains Nasdaq minimum bid price compliance By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jiuzi Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:JZXN) has regained compliance with the Nasdaq Stock Market's minimum bid price requirement. The company confirmed receipt of a notification letter from Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department after its ordinary shares traded at or above $1.00 for 19 consecutive business days. This resolves a prior non-compliance notification from November 2025 where its shares had fallen below the minimum bid price.

feed.title: Insider Selling: ANI Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ANIP) VP Sells 500 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals VP, Meredith Cook, sold 500 shares of company stock on January 13th for $42,165, reducing her ownership by 0.67%. The sale occurred at an average price of $84.33 per share. The company's stock currently trades around $85.03, and it recently beat Q3 earnings estimates with revenue up 53.6% year-over-year.

feed.title: Heritage Commerce (HTBK) Price Target Increased by 10.14% to 13.67
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Heritage Commerce (HTBK) has been increased by 10.14% to $13.67 per share, an average compiled from various analysts' estimates. This new target is 9.70% higher than the latest closing price of $12.46. Institutional ownership and fund sentiment for HTBK show a generally bullish outlook, with a significant number of funds holding increased positions despite some reallocations.

feed.title: Assured Guaranty LTD sells $81,941 in Sound Point Meridian (SPMC) By Investing.com
feed.summary: Assured Guaranty LTD, a significant owner of Sound Point Meridian Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPMC), sold 5,697 shares of common stock totaling $81,941 across three transactions between January 12 and January 14, 2026. Following these sales, Assured Guaranty LTD indirectly retains 5,274,557 shares. The article also notes recent company developments, including an estimated net asset value (NAV) range and the appointment of Daniel Fabian as the new Chief Financial Officer.

feed.title: Duke Energy Plans to Build a Massive Natural Gas Power Plant in Davidson County. But Where, Exactly?
feed.summary: Duke Energy plans to build a large 1,360-megawatt natural gas power plant in western Davidson County, North Carolina, which could add significant greenhouse gases to the atmosphere. While Duke remains cagey about the exact site, environmentalists have identified a 1,600-acre company-owned parcel near the Yadkin River as a potential location. This fossil fuel expansion is part of Duke's strategy to meet growing energy demands, citing data centers and population increases, but faces opposition due to environmental concerns and potential cost increases for ratepayers.

feed.title: Jefferies Financial Group Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) Stock Price
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has lowered its price target for Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) to $506 from $517, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 13.1% upside. Despite a mixed analyst sentiment of "Moderate Buy" and recent strong quarterly earnings, insider selling activity suggests caution, with 32,002 shares worth approximately $14.3 million sold in the last quarter. The company, a leading infrastructure solutions provider, beat revenue and EPS estimates and provided positive FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Susquehanna Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) Stock
feed.summary: Susquehanna has increased its price target for Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) to $304 from $288, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a 4.52% upside. Analyst consensus for NSC is a "Hold" with an average target of $303.52, while the stock trades near its one-year high. Recent insider purchases and significant institutional ownership underscore investor interest in the railroad operator.

feed.title: BMO Capital Markets Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) Stock Price
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets has lowered its price target for Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) to $200 from $208, maintaining an "outperform" rating and implying a 12.9% upside. Despite this adjustment, the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $196.79. The company's stock recently traded down at $177.20, with a market capitalization of approximately $53.3 billion.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt beats fourth-quarter estimates, reports year-over-year earnings increase
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. reported strong fourth-quarter results for 2025, surpassing analyst estimates for earnings per share despite a slight decrease in overall revenue. The company achieved a net income of $181.1 million, or $1.90 per share, primarily driven by better-than-expected performance in its intermodal segment and significant cost-saving initiatives. Looking to 2026, J.B. Hunt aims to focus on disciplined growth, leveraging investments, and improving company margins amidst what its CEO described as a "fragile" but opportunistic freight market.

feed.title: Hologic to Announce Financial Results for the First Quarter of Fiscal 2026 on Thursday, January 29, 2026
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. (Nasdaq: HOLX) announced that it will release its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 on Thursday, January 29, 2026, after the market closes. Due to its pending acquisition by Blackstone and TPG, the company will not host a quarterly conference call or provide financial guidance. Hologic focuses on improving women's health through medical technology.
